title: Burari Isekai Kemo no Tabi
description:
Animal ears, cuddling, relaxing… and a little naughty☆

The kind-hearted boy Takumi is reincarnated into another world, where he meets Pouche the cow girl, Ranan the rabbit girl, and Shanoa the cat girl. Using his skill "Animal Lover," he grows close to these girls who possess animal-like abilities, and aims to live a laid-back, soft-and-easy life in this other world☆

An explosive lineup of huge, beautiful breasts! A brand-new world illustrated by master of chests Atsuto Shinozuka is released under the body-sensation-fetish comic label "NOiPA COMiCS"!!

The digital edition includes a bonus newly drawn illustration!
author: Shinozuka Atsuto
